title: Immunocytochemistry with mDANs
author: Ellen Hertz
materials: Dilute primary antibodies in blocking buffer Sheep Tyrosine Hydroxylase Pel-Freez Catalog #P60101-150 1:400 RFP Antibody Pre-adsorbed ROCKLAND antibodes & assays Catalog # 600-401-379 1:500 HNF-3β/FoxA2 antibody Neuromics Catalog #GT15186 1:500 Mouse anti-Human GCase antibody (Clone 1/23) Michael J Fox Foundation (MJFF) Research Tools Catalog 1:1000 LAMP1 (D2D11) XP® Rabbit mAb (PE Conjugate) Cell Signaling Technology Catalog #85995 1:500 GFP tag Polyclonal antibody Proteintech Catalog #50430-2-AP 1:1000 Mitofusin-1 (D6E2S) Rabbit mAb Cell Signaling Technology Catalog #14739 1:100 StrepMAB-Classic IBA Lifesciences Catalog #2-1507-001 1:100
Dilute secondary antibodies from Jackson ImmunoResearches matching primary antibodies in blocking buffer and incubate 1 hour at Room temperature
Incubate with primary antibodies at 4 °C Overnight
On day 35; fix mDANs in Paraformaldehyde solution 4% in PBS Santa Cruz Biotechnology Catalog #sc-281692 for 00:30:00 at Room temperature
Dissociate Day 25 mDANs with Accutase for 00:15:00

steps.title: Coat 8-well imaging chambers (Ibidi Cat#...
steps.instruction: Coat 8-well imaging chambers (Ibidi Cat# 80807-90) with Geltrex 37 °C for 01:00:00 . Geltrex™ LDEV-Free, hESC-Qualified, Reduced Growth Factor Basement Membrane Matrix Thermo Fisher Catalog #A1413302

steps.title: Resuspend dissociated mDANs in Neurobasal media...
steps.instruction: Resuspend dissociated mDANs in Neurobasal media + B27 w/o vitamin A + CEPT

steps.title: Wash cells 00:05:00 in 200 µL DPBS with gentle rocking
steps.instruction: Wash cells 00:05:00 in 200 µL DPBS with gentle rocking. Repeat for a total of 3 washes

steps.title: Add blocking solution (1% BSA, 0
steps.instruction: Add blocking solution (1% BSA, 0.1% saponin in PBS) for 1 hour at Room temperature

steps.title: Wash cells 5 minutes in 200...
steps.instruction: Wash cells 5 minutes in 200 µL PBS with gentle rocking. Repeat for a total of 3 washes

steps.title: Wash cells 5 minutes in 200...
steps.instruction: Wash cells 5 minutes in 200 µL PBS with gentle rocking. In second wash include NucBlue™ Fixed Cell ReadyProbes™ Reagent Thermo Fisher Catalog #R37606

steps.title: Seed mDANs in Geltrex-coated imaging chamber at 50~100k cells/ cm2
steps.instruction: Seed mDANs in Geltrex-coated imaging chamber at 50~100k cells/ cm2.
